dataset.name: Carrier
dataset.description: Master records for all carriers, brokers, and freight forwarders with active, inactive, or pending authorities (common or contract). Includes DOT and docket numbers, entity census data, authority statuses, insurance summary flags, and both business and mailing addresses.
dataset.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time
dataset.scope: Includes records updated or added since the previous dataset run. May also include related records for the same entity for completeness.

naming_convention.daily_difference: [Dataset Name] — contains only recently changed/added records
naming_convention.full_baseline: [Dataset Name] – All With History — contains all records including historical values

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.description: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.description: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: MX Type
fields.description: Character distinguishing Mexican carriers

valid_values.description: OP-2 — Operate in Commercial Zones only

fields.notes: Only populated for Mexican carriers. Blank for US/Canadian entities.

fields.name: RFC Number
fields.description: Mexican Government registration code (Registro Federal de Contribuyentes) for Mexican carriers

fields.name: Common Authority
fields.description: Status of common carrier authority

fields.name: Contract Authority
fields.description: Status of contract carrier authority

fields.name: Broker Authority
fields.description: Status of broker authority

fields.name: Pending Common Authority
fields.description: Whether a common authority application is pending

fields.name: Pending Contract Authority
fields.description: Whether a contract authority application is pending

fields.name: Pending Broker Authority
fields.description: Whether a broker authority application is pending

fields.name: Common Authority Revocation
fields.description: Whether common authority is currently in revocation

fields.name: Contract Authority Revocation
fields.description: Whether contract authority is currently in revocation

fields.name: Broker Authority Revocation
fields.description: Whether broker authority is currently in revocation

fields.name: Property
fields.description: Whether the entity is authorized to transport property

fields.name: Passenger
fields.description: Whether the entity is authorized to transport passengers

fields.name: Household Goods
fields.description: Whether the entity is authorized to transport household goods

fields.name: Private Check
fields.description: Whether the entity is flagged as a private carrier

fields.name: Enterprise Check
fields.description: Whether the entity is flagged as an enterprise carrier

fields.name: BIPD Required
fields.description: Amount of BI&PD (Bodily Injury & Property Damage) insurance required for this entity, in thousands

fields.name: Cargo Required
fields.description: Whether cargo insurance is required

fields.name: Bond/Surety Required
fields.description: Whether a bond or surety is required

fields.name: BIPD on File
fields.description: Amount of BI&PD insurance currently on file for this entity, in thousands

fields.name: Cargo on File
fields.description: Whether cargo insurance is on file

fields.name: Bond/Surety on File
fields.description: Whether a bond or surety is on file

fields.name: Address Status
fields.description: Whether the entity's address is verified as deliverable

fields.name: DBA Name
fields.description: Doing Business As name for the entity

fields.name: Legal Name
fields.description: Company legal name

fields.name: Business Address - PO Box/Street
fields.description: Company business address street or PO Box

fields.name: Business Address - Colonia
fields.description: Company business address colonia (Mexican addresses)

fields.name: Business Address - City
fields.description: Company business address city

fields.name: Business Address - State Code
fields.description: Company business address state code

fields.name: Business Address - Country Code
fields.description: Company business address country code

fields.name: Business Address - Zip Code
fields.description: Company business address zip code

fields.name: Business Address - Telephone Number
fields.description: Company business telephone number (if on file)

fields.name: Business Address - Fax Number
fields.description: Company business fax number (if on file)

fields.name: Mailing Address - PO Box/Street
fields.description: Company mailing address street or PO Box

fields.name: Mailing Address - Colonia
fields.description: Company mailing address colonia (Mexican addresses)

fields.name: Mailing Address - City
fields.description: Company mailing address city

fields.name: Mailing Address - State Code
fields.description: Company mailing address state code

fields.name: Mailing Address - Country Code
fields.description: Company mailing address country code

fields.name: Mailing Address - Zip Code
fields.description: Company mailing address zip code

fields.name: Mailing Address - Telephone Number
fields.description: Company mailing telephone number (if on file)

fields.name: Mailing Address - Fax Number
fields.description: Company mailing fax number (if on file)

related_datasets.name: Insur
related_datasets.relationship: Individual active/pending insurance policies behind the summary flags in fields #19-24

related_datasets.name: ActPendInsur
related_datasets.relationship: Active/pending insurance policy date details (posted, effective, cancel dates)

related_datasets.name: AuthHist
related_datasets.relationship: Full authority lifecycle history (grant through revocation)

related_datasets.name: BOC3
related_datasets.relationship: Process agent (BOC-3) filings for the entity

related_datasets.name: Revocation
related_datasets.relationship: Detailed revocation records behind the Y/N flags in fields #11-13

disclaimer: Data is provided as a public service by FMCSA for informational purposes only. It is a point-in-time snapshot and does not constitute legal advice or a legal contract.
